siteDescription: Backend engineer building production APIs, distributed systems, and LLM applications.
roleTagline: Node.js · TypeScript · Python · AWS · Production APIs & LLM Systems

hireMe.headline: Available for production backend, API, and LLM system work
hireMe.summary: I mainly focus on backend engineering and the software lifecycle around production systems. I help teams ship production-grade APIs, LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and scalable cloud infrastructure—from architecture and implementation through deployment and maintenance.

services.title: Backend & API Engineering
services.description: REST/GraphQL APIs with Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis, and event-driven architectures.

services.title: AI & LLM Applications
services.description: RAG pipelines, multi-agent workflows, prompt engineering, and MLOps with LangChain, OpenAI, and vector databases.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: AWS infrastructure, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, monitoring, and security best practices.
